mapper.select: SELECT z.zone_id AS zoneId, -- (수정) 중복 방지를 위해 DISTINCT 추가 (한 작업자가 여러 로그를 가질 가능성 배제) COUNT(DISTINCT wl.worker_id) AS workerCount, 0.0 AS progressRate, -- 현재는 진행률 0.0 고정 'STABLE' AS status -- 기본 상태 STABLE FROM zones z -- 관리자가 배정한 구역의 작업자만 조인 (Role=WORKER) LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' -- 그 작업자가 현재 출근 중(ended_at IS NULL)인지 확인 LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL GROUP BY z.zone_id ORDER BY z.zone_id

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, COALESCE(wc.daily_count, 0) AS workCount, 0.0 AS processingSpeed, 0.0 AS currentTaskProgress, 'WORKING' AS status, 'AVAILABLE' AS webrtcStatus FROM users u INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL -- (최적화) 서브쿼리 대신 Derived Table 조인 사용 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bt.worker_id, COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id) AS daily_count FROM batch_tasks bt JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id WHERE bti.status != 'PENDING' AND DATE(bti.last_scanned_at) = CURDATE() GROUP BY bt.worker_id ) wc ON wc.worker_id = u.user_id WHERE u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT worker_id) FROM work_logs WHERE ended_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'OPEN'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'RESOLVED' AND DATE(resolved_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.assigned_zone_id AS zoneId, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, zl.location_code AS currentLocationCode, -- 금일 작업 처리량 (서브쿼리) ( SELECT COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id) FROM batch_tasks bt_sub JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt_sub.batch_task_id WHERE bt_sub.worker_id = u.user_id AND bti.status != 'PENDING' AND DATE(bti.last_scanned_at) = CURDATE() ) AS todayWorkCount, -- 최근 발생한 이슈 (서브쿼리) ( SELECT issue_type FROM issues WHERE worker_id = u.user_id AND status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS recentIssueType FROM users u -- 활성 작업자 확인 (출근 중) INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL -- 현재 위치 (진행 중인 작업의 위치) LEFT JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.worker_id = u.user_id AND bt.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LEFT JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = bt.current_location_id WHERE u.user_id = #{workerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE zone_assignments SET ended_at = NOW() WHERE worker_id = #{workerId} AND ended_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zone_assignments (worker_id, zone_id, assignment_type, source, started_at, reason) VALUES (#{workerId}, #{zoneId}, 'BASE', 'ADMIN', NOW(), #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT line_id AS lineId, line_name AS lineName FROM zone_lines WHERE zone_id = #{zoneId}

SELECT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, zl.location_code AS currentLocationCode, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, bt.started_at, NOW()) >= #{thresholdSeconds} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isBottleneck FROM users u -- 활성 작업자 (출근 중) INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL -- 현재 진행 중인 작업 (위치 파악용) INNER JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.worker_id = u.user_id AND bt.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' INNER JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = bt.current_location_id WHERE u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId}

SELECT u.user_id AS adminId, u.name AS rawName, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, u.assigned_zone_id AS assignedZoneId,
-- 최신 근무 상태 (Window Function 결과 이용) IFNULL(le.event_type, 'END') AS currentStatus FROM users u
-- 현재 진행 중인 근무 로그 확인 (없으면 퇴근 상태) LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL
-- 최신 이벤트 조인 (ROW_NUMBER 사용, idx_work_log_events_log_time 인덱스 활용) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT work_log_id, event_type, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY work_log_id ORDER BY occurred_at DESC) as rn FROM work_log_events ) le ON wl.work_log_id = le.work_log_id AND le.rn = 1
WHERE u.role = 'ADMIN'
AND u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId}
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY u.name ASC

SELECT z.zone_id FROM zones z LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL GROUP BY z.zone_id ORDER BY COUNT(wl.work_log_id) ASC, z.zone_id ASC LIMIT 1
